response.justification: The candidate lacks the mandatory 5–10 years of professional C++ development experience on Windows and has no domain expertise in Fixed Income, Fixed Income Derivatives, or investment banking capital markets. While they have substantial software development experience, their background is heavily skewed toward web, mobile, and scripting languages (TypeScript, Node.js, JavaScript) with minimal C++ and no financial domain exposure.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with modern languages and frameworks
Proven ability to contribute to complex, high-traffic systems
Evidence of technical leadership and community engagement (workshops, talks)
concerns: No direct C++ development on Windows platform (key mandatory skill)
No domain expertise in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income
Primary expertise in non-C++ stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) with limited SQL depth
